comments.packageManager: CRITICAL: Must sync with mise.toml pnpm version AND MODULE.bazel
comments.engines.node: CRITICAL: Must sync with mise.toml node version AND MODULE.bazel node.toolchain(node_version). Must be LTS (even-numbered).
comments.devDependencies.typescript: CRITICAL: Must sync with MODULE.bazel rules_ts_ext.deps(ts_version). Must be exact version (no semver range).
